1998年，拍摄的电视剧《将爱情进行到底》是中国大陆首部青春爱情偶像剧集。2001年张一白执导电影处女作《开往春天的地铁》。2004年执导电影《恋爱地图》。2006年执导都市爱情悬疑电影《好奇害死猫》。2009年12月31日上午，北京警方证实，12月29日晚，曾执导《好奇害死猫》等影片的导演张一白因吸食毒品被市公安局禁毒处在朝阳区某饭店前抓获。随后，其于2010年1月12日获释。 2010年，集合电视剧原班人马拍摄电影版《将爱情进行到底》。2014年，拍摄改编自九夜茴同名小说的电影《匆匆那年》，凭借此片荣获第22届北京大学生电影节最受大学生欢迎导演。2016年，拍摄改编张嘉佳同名小说《从你的全世界路过》。
data.name: 张一白

data.biography:
Zhang Xiaoling, better known by his stage name Zhang Yibai (simplified Chinese: 张一白; traditional Chinese: 張一白) (born 14 April 1963, in Chongqing, China) is a Chinese film director, screenwriter and producer. Zhang began his career in television and music videos before directing his debut, Spring Subway in 2002. Zhang, like many other modern Chinese directors, has focused primarily on life in modern Chinese cities. Spring Subway, for example, follows its protagonist as he wanders through Beijing's subway system, while the mystery-thriller Curiosity Killed the Cat follows its characters through the central China boomtown of Chongqing (also Zhang's hometown).

His next two films, 2007's The Longest Night in Shanghai and 2008's Lost, Indulgence have seen the director's exposure and successes extending increasingly overseas. Longest Night, starring Zhao Wei, constitutes one of the first China-Japan coproductions, while Lost was selected to premiere at New York City's Tribeca Film Festival in 2008.
data.name: Zhang Yibai

張一白，1963 年出生於重慶，電影導演、監製，重慶大學美視電影學院碩士生導師，中國第六代導演之一 。1991 年畢業於中央戲劇學院戲劇文學系。

1998 年，拍攝的電視劇《將愛情進行到底》是中國大陸首部青春愛情偶像劇集。2001 年張一白執導電影處女作《開往春天的地鐵》。2004 年執導電影《戀愛地圖》。2006 年執導都市愛情懸疑電影《好奇害死貓》。2009 年 12 月 31 日上午，北京警方證實，12 月 29 日晚，曾執導《好奇害死貓》等影片的導演張一白因吸食毒品被市公安局禁毒處在朝陽區某飯店前抓獲。隨後，其於 2010 年 1 月 12 日獲釋。

2010 年，集合電視劇原班人馬拍攝電影版《將愛情進行到底》。2014 年，拍攝改編自九夜茴同名小説的電影《匆匆那年》，憑藉此片榮獲第 22 屆北京大學生電影節最受大學生歡迎導演。2016 年，拍攝改編張嘉佳同名小説《從你的全世界路過》。
data.name: 張一白

data.biography:
Mena Alexandra Suvari (born February 13, 1979) is an American actress, producer, fashion designer, and model. She's best known for her roles as Angela Hayes in American Beauty, Heather in the American Pie film series, Coty Pierce in Kiss the Girls, Edie on HBO's Six Feet Under (for which she earned a Screen Actors Guild nomination), Francesca Bonacieux in The Musketeer (2001), Joanne in Beauty Shop, Annie Huttinger in Rumor Has It..., Isabella on the second season of NBC's Chicago Fire, Maria Abascal on WEtv's South of Hell, and Kathleen on Paramount's dramedy American Woman.

After beginning her career as a model and guest-starring on several television shows, she made her film debut in the 1997 drama Nowhere. She rose to international prominence with her appearances in the critically acclaimed drama American Beauty (1999), for which she received a BAFTA nomination for Best Supporting Actress.

Her other notable film credits include Slums of Beverly Hills (1998), The Rage: Carrie 2 (1999), Loser (2000), Sugar & Spice (2001), Sonny (2002), Spun (2003), Trauma (2004), Domino (2005), Factory Girl (2006), Brooklyn Rules, Stuck (both 2007), Day of the Dead (2008), and You May Not Kiss the Bride (2010). She also portrayed Elizabeth Short in the anthology series American Horror Story: Murder House (2011), and reprised the part in American Horror Story: Apocalypse (2018).  She has been a model for Lancôme cosmetics and print ads for Lancôme Paris Adaptîve, as well as a long-time supporter and activist for the Starlight Children's Foundation and the African Medical and Research Foundation. She is married and has one child.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Mena Suvari, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Mena Suvari

data.biography:
Mena Alexandra Suvari (* 13. Februar 1979 in Newport, Rhode Island) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin, Produzentin, Modedesignerin und Model. Sie ist vor allem bekannt für ihre Rollen als Angela Hayes in American Beauty, Heather in der American Pie-Filmreihe, Coty Pierce in Kiss the Girls, Edie in der HBO-Serie Six Feet Under (für die sie eine Nominierung der Screen Actors Guild erhielt), Francesca Bonacieux in The Musketeer (2001), Joanne in Beauty Shop, Annie Huttinger in Rumor Has It …, Isabella in der zweiten Staffel von NBCs Chicago Fire, Maria Abascal in WEtvs South of Hell und Kathleen in Paramounts Dramedy American Woman.

Nachdem sie ihre Karriere als Model begonnen und in mehreren Fernsehserien Gastrollen gespielt hatte, gab sie 1997 ihr Filmdebüt in dem Drama Nowhere. Internationale Bekanntheit erlangte sie durch ihre Auftritte in dem von der Kritik gefeierten Drama American Beauty (1999), für das sie eine BAFTA-Nominierung als beste Nebendarstellerin erhielt.

Zu ihren weiteren bemerkenswerten Filmrollen zählen Slums of Beverly Hills (1998), The Rage: Carrie 2 (1999), Loser (2000), Sugar & Spice (2001), Sonny (2002), Spun (2003), Trauma (2004), Domino (2005), Factory Girl (2006), Brooklyn Rules, Stuck (beide 2007), Day of the Dead (2008) und You May Not Kiss the Bride (2010). Außerdem spielte sie Elizabeth Short in der Anthologie-Serie American Horror Story: Murder House (2011) und wiederholte diese Rolle in American Horror Story: Apocalypse (2018).

Sie war Model für Lancôme-Kosmetik und Printanzeigen für Lancôme Paris Adaptîve sowie langjährige Unterstützerin und Aktivistin für die Starlight Children's Foundation und die African Medical and Research Foundation. Sie ist verheiratet und hat ein Kind.

Mena Alexandra Suvari (Newport, Rhode Island, 1979. február 13. –) amerikai színésznő, divattervező és modell.

Pályafutása elején modellként dolgozott, illetve televíziós sorozatokban vendégszerepelt, majd az 1997-es Út a pokolba című filmmel debütált a mozivásznon. Nemzetközi hírnévre az Amerikai szépség (1999) című filmdrámával tett szert, alakítását női mellékszereplőként BAFTA-jelöléssel honorálták és a film többi szereplőjével közösen Screen Actors Guild-díjat is nyert. Az Amerikai pite filmek három részében szerepelt (1999-ben, 2001-ben és 2012-ben). További jelentősebb filmjei közé tartozik a Beverly Hills csórói (1998), a Lúzer (2000), a Bankrabló csajok (2001), az Azt beszélik (2005), a Halálra ítélve (2007) és a Ne csókold meg a menyasszonyt! (2010).

A HBO Sírhant művek című sorozatának negyedik évadjában (2004) visszatérő szerepet vállalt, ahogyan a Lángoló Chicago második évadjában is (2013). Az Amerikai Horror Story A gyilkos ház (2013) és az Apokalipszis (2018) elnevezésű évadjaiban Elizabeth Shortot játszotta.

Suvari modellként a Lancôme kozmetikumok reklámarca, továbbá aktivistaként hosszú ideje támogat jótékony ügyeket.

Virendra Saxena is an Indian theater, film and television actor. He is an alumnus of the National School of Drama. Saxena is known for his character roles as well as his unique voice. He has acted in more than 80 Indian films and a few English-language films such as White Rainbow, Cotton Mary, and In Custody. Prominent TV serials he has acted in include Ajnabi and Jassi Jaissi Koi Nahin.

Saxena is a critically acclaimed actor in the Indian film and television industry. He appeared in Mahesh Bhatt's musical classic Aashiqui in the song "Tu Meri Zindagi Hai" as the street singer.

(Wikipedia)

data.biography:
Richard Philip Lewis (June 29, 1947 – February 27, 2024) was an American actor, writer, and stand-up comedian. He came to prominence in the 1980s and became known for his dark, neurotic and self-deprecating humor.

As an actor he was known for co-starring with Jamie Lee Curtis in the sitcom Anything but Love, for playing the role of Prince John in the film Robin Hood: Men in Tights and for his recurring role as a semi-fictionalized version of himself in HBO's Curb Your Enthusiasm.

Chamras Tasnalawat or Nay Myo Thant is a Thai rapper of Burmese descent, commonly referred to as "Sunny Day" who came to prominence in the early 2000s as a member of the Thai-American hip-hop group Thaitanium. His group has earned a dedicated fan base with releases like Thailand's Most Wanted (2006) and Still Resisting (2010).

He graduated from Tamalpais High School in Mill Valley, California. He is the owner of the clothing brand 9face Clothing. He once joined Tata Young on stage for a live performance of Michael Jackson's "Dangerous." Currently, he has a son and a daughter.
data.name: Day Thaitanium

data.biography:
Rakul Preet Singh is an Indian film actress and model who predominantly works in Telugu film industry. She has also appeared in a few Tamil, Hindi and Kannada films.

Rakul started a modelling career while in college, during which she also made her acting debut in the Kannada film Gilli (2009). In 2011, she participated in the Femina Miss India pageant in which she was placed fifth and won five pageant titles, including 'Miss India People’s Choice'. She subsequently opted to become a full-time actress, making her Telugu debut in Keratam the same year and her Tamil debut in Thadaiyara Thaakka, the following year. In 2014 she also made her Bollywood debut in Yaariyan in which her performance was better received.
data.name: Rakul Preet Singh

拉库尔在大学期间开始了模特生涯，在此期间，她还在卡纳达语电影《吉利》（2009 年）中首次亮相。2011 年，她参加了 Femina 印度小姐选美比赛，获得第五名，并赢得了五项选美冠军，包括“印度小姐人民选择”。随后，她选择成为一名全职女演员，同年在Keratam首次亮相泰卢固语，次年在Thadaiyara Thaakka首次亮相泰米尔语。2014 年，她还在 Yaariyan 首次亮相宝莱坞，她的表演受到了更好的欢迎。

data.biography:
Hope Elizabeth Soberano (born January 4, 1998) is an American and Filipino actress. Known for playing supporting characters in dramas and comedies as a teenager, she has since expanded her repertoire to leading roles in television and film. She has received several accolades, including a FAMAS Award, a PMPC Star Award, and six Box Office Entertainment Awards. Tatler magazine named her one of the most influential people in Asia in 2022 and 2023.

Soberano found commercial success in several romantic films, including My Ex and Whys (2017), for which she earned the Box Office Entertainment Award for Box Office Queen. Attempting to shed her image as an on-screen couple with Gil, she sought roles in other genres and debuted as a voice actress in the animated series Trese (2021). In 2022, she returned to California to pursue an acting career in Hollywood and has since starred in the horror comedy film Lisa Frankenstein (2024). Soberano has been described by media publications as one of the most beautiful Filipino actresses of her generation. She is vocal about gender equality, women's rights, and mental health.
data.name: Liza Soberano

data.biography:
James Nesbitt (born 15 January 1965) is a Northern Irish actor. Born in Ballymena, County Antrim, Northern Ireland, Nesbitt grew up in the nearby village of Broughshane, before moving to Coleraine, County Londonderry. He wanted to become a teacher, like his father, so began a degree in French at the University of Ulster. He dropped out after a year when he decided to become an actor, and transferred to the Central School of Speech and Drama in London. After graduating in 1987, he spent seven years performing in plays that varied from the musical Up on the Roof (1987, 1989) to the political drama Paddywack (1994). He made his feature film debut playing talent agent Fintan O'Donnell in Hear My Song (1991).

Nesbitt got his breakthrough television role playing Adam Williams in the romantic comedy-drama Cold Feet (1998–2003), which won him a British Comedy Award, a Television and Radio Industries Club Award, and a National Television Award. His first significant film role came when he appeared as pig farmer "Pig" Finn in Waking Ned (1998). With the rest of the starring cast, Nesbitt was nominated for a Screen Actors Guild Award. In Lucky Break (2001), he made his debut as a film lead playing prisoner Jimmy Hands. The next year, he played Ivan Cooper in the television film Bloody Sunday, about the 1972 shootings in Derry. A departure from his previous "cheeky chappie" roles, the film was a turning point in his career. He won a British Independent Film Award and was nominated for the British Academy Television Award for Best Actor.

Nesbitt has also starred in Murphy's Law (2001–2007) as undercover detective Tommy Murphy—a role that was created for him by writer Colin Bateman. The role twice gained Nesbitt Best Actor nominations at the Irish Film & Television Awards (IFTA). In 2007, he starred in the dual role of Tom Jackman and Mr Hyde in Steven Moffat's Jekyll, which earned him a Golden Globe Award nomination in 2008. Nesbitt has since appeared in several more dramatic roles; he starred alongside Liam Neeson in Five Minutes of Heaven (2009), and was one of three lead actors in the television miniseries Occupation (2009) and The Deep (2010). He also starred in the movies Outcast (2010) and Emilio Estevez's The Way (2011), and has been cast in Peter Jackson's The Hobbit (2012/13).

Nesbitt is married to former actress Sonia Forbes-Adam, with whom he has two daughters. He is a patron of numerous charities and in 2010 accepted the ceremonial position of Chancellor of the University of Ulster.
data.name: James Nesbitt

data.biography:
James Nesbitt (nacido el 15 de enero de 1965) es un actor norirlandés. Nacido en Ballymena, County Antrim, Irlanda del Norte, Nesbitt creció en el cercano pueblo de Broughshane, antes de trasladarse a Coleraine, County Londonderry. Quería ser profesor, como su padre, así que se licenció en francés en la Universidad de Ulster. Dejó la escuela después de un año cuando decidió convertirse en actor, y fue transferido a la Escuela Central de Lenguaje y Drama en Londres. Después de graduarse en 1987, pasó siete años actuando en obras que variaban desde el musical Up on the Roof (1987, 1989) hasta el drama político Paddywack (1994). Hizo su debut en el cine interpretando al agente de talentos Fintan O'Donnell en Hear My Song (1991).

Nesbitt consiguió su gran avance en la televisión interpretando a Adam Williams en la comedia romántica Cold Feet (1998-2003), que le valió el Premio de la Comedia Británica, el Premio del Club de Industrias de Televisión y Radio y el Premio Nacional de Televisión. Su primer papel importante en la película fue cuando apareció como criador de cerdos "Pig" Finn en Waking Ned (1998). Con el resto del reparto estelar, Nesbitt fue nominado para el premio Screen Actors Guild Award. En Lucky Break (2001), debutó como protagonista de una película interpretando al prisionero Jimmy Hands. Al año siguiente, interpretó a Ivan Cooper en la película de televisión Bloody Sunday, sobre los rodajes de 1972 en Derry. La película fue un punto de inflexión en su carrera, alejándose de sus anteriores papeles de "cheeky chappie". Ganó el Premio de Cine Independiente Británico y fue nominado para el Premio de Televisión de la Academia Británica al Mejor Actor.

Nesbitt también ha protagonizado la Ley de Murphy (2001-2007) como detective encubierto Tommy Murphy, un papel creado para él por el escritor Colin Bateman. El papel ganó dos veces las nominaciones a Mejor Actor de Nesbitt en los Irish Film & Television Awards (IFTA). En 2007, protagonizó el doble papel de Tom Jackman y Mr Hyde en Jekyll, de Steven Moffat, lo que le valió una nominación al Globo de Oro en 2008. Desde entonces, Nesbitt ha aparecido en varios papeles más dramáticos; protagonizó junto a Liam Neeson en Cinco minutos del cielo (2009), y fue uno de los tres actores principales de la miniserie de televisión Occupation (2009) y The Deep (2010). También protagonizó las películas Outcast (2010) y The Way (2011), de Emilio Estevez, y ha sido seleccionado en The Hobbit (2012/13), de Peter Jackson.

Nesbitt está casado con la ex actriz Sonia Forbes-Adam, con quien tiene dos hijas. Es mecenas de numerosas organizaciones benéficas y en 2010 aceptó el cargo ceremonial de Canciller de la Universidad de Ulster.

James Nesbitt, attore nordirlandese, è nato il 15 gennaio 1965 a Ballymena, nella contea di Antrim nell'Irlanda del Nord. Nesbitt è poi cresciuto nel vicino villaggio di Broughshane prima di trasferirsi a Coleraine nella contea di Londonderry. Voleva diventare un insegnante, come suo padre, così iniziò una laurea in francese all'Università dell'Ulster. Ha abbandonato dopo un anno gli studi quando ha deciso di diventare un attore trasferendosi alla Central School of Speech and Drama di Londra. Dopo la laurea nel 1987, ha trascorso sette anni esibendosi in spettacoli che variavano dal musical Up on the Roof (1987, 1989) al dramma politico Paddywack (1994). Ha fatto il suo debutto cinematografico interpretando il talent agent Fintan O'Donnell in Hear My Song (1991).

Nesbitt ha ottenuto il suo importante ruolo televisivo interpretando Adam Williams nella commedia romantica Cold Feet (1998-2003) che gli è valso un British Comedy Award, un Television and Radio Industries Club Award e un National Television Award. Il suo primo ruolo da protagonista è arrivato quando è apparso come allevatore di maiali "Pig" Finn in Waking Ned (1998). Con il resto del cast protagonista, Nesbitt è stato nominato per un Screen Actors Guild Award. In Lucky Break (2001) è stato il protagonista nei panni del prigioniero Jimmy Hands. L'anno successivo, ha interpretato Ivan Cooper nel film televisivo Bloody Sunday. Un distacco dai suoi precedenti ruoli di "ragazzo sfacciato", il film è stato un punto di svolta nella sua carriera. Ha vinto un British Independent Film Award ed è stato nominato per il British Academy Television Award come miglior attore.

Nesbitt ha anche recitato in Murphy's Law (2001-2007) nel ruolo del detective sotto copertura Tommy Murphy, un ruolo che è stato creato per lui dallo scrittore Colin Bateman. Il ruolo ha ottenuto due volte la nomination come migliore attore Nesbitt agli Irish Film & Television Awards (IFTA). Nel 2007, ha recitato nel doppio ruolo di Tom Jackman e Mr Hyde in Jekyll di Steven Moffat, che gli è valso una nomination al Golden Globe Award nel 2008. Nesbitt è apparso anche in diversi ruoli più drammatici; ha recitato accanto a Liam Neeson in Five Minutes of Heaven (2009) ed è stato uno dei tre attori principali nella miniserie televisiva Occupation (2009) e The Deep (2010). Ha anche recitato nei film Outcast (2010) e The Way (2011) di Emilio Estevez, ed è stato inoltre scelto per The Hobbit (2012/13) di Peter Jackson.

Nesbitt è sposato con l'ex attrice Sonia Forbes-Adam con la quale ha due figlie. È patrono di numerose organizzazioni benefiche e nel 2010 ha accettato la carica onoraria di Cancelliere dell'Università dell'Ulster.

詹姆斯·内斯比特（James Nesbitt，1965年1月15日-），北爱尔兰演员。内斯比特出生于北爱尔兰安特里姆郡的巴利米纳，在附近的布劳沙恩村长大，然后搬到伦敦德里郡的科尔雷恩。他想像父亲一样成为一名教师，因此开始在阿尔斯特大学攻读法语学位。一年后，当他决定成为一名演员时，他辍学了，并转学到伦敦的中央演讲和戏剧学院。1987年毕业后，他花了七年时间演出了从音乐剧《屋顶上》（1987年、1989年）到政治剧《帕迪瓦克》（1994年）等各种戏剧。他在《听我的歌》（1991 年）中扮演艺人经纪人 Fintan O'Donnell 首次亮相。

内斯比特在浪漫喜剧《冷脚》（1998-2003）中扮演亚当·威廉姆斯（Adam Williams）获得了突破性的电视角色，这为他赢得了英国喜剧奖、电视和广播工业俱乐部奖以及国家电视奖。他的第一个重要电影角色是在《醒来的内德》（1998 年）中饰演养猪场主“猪”芬恩。与其他主演一起，内斯比特获得了美国演员工会奖的提名。在 Lucky Break （2001） 中，他作为电影主角首次亮相，饰演囚犯吉米·汉兹。第二年，他在电视电影《血腥星期天》中扮演伊万·库珀，讲述了 1972 年德里枪击事件。与他之前的“厚脸皮”角色不同，这部电影是他职业生涯的转折点。他获得了英国独立电影奖，并获得了英国学院电视奖最佳男主角提名。

内斯比特还出演了《墨菲定律》（2001-2007）中的卧底侦探汤米·墨菲（Tommy Murphy），这个角色是由作家科林·贝特曼（Colin Bateman）为他创造的。这个角色两次获得爱尔兰电影电视奖（IFTA）的内斯比特最佳男主角提名。2007年，他在史蒂文·莫法特（Steven Moffat）的《杰基尔》（Jekyll）中出演了汤姆·杰克曼（Tom Jackman）和海德先生（Mr Hyde）的双重角色，这为他赢得了2008年金球奖提名。此后，内斯比特出演了几个更具戏剧性的角色。他与连姆·尼森一起出演了《天堂的五分钟》（2009 年），并且是电视迷你剧《职业》（2009 年）和《深海》（2010 年）的三位主演之一。他还出演了电影《流浪者》（2010 年）和埃米利奥·埃斯特维兹的《路》（2011 年），并出演了彼得·杰克逊的《霍比特人》（2012/13 年）。

内斯比特与前女演员索尼娅·福布斯-亚当结婚，育有两个女儿。他是众多慈善机构的赞助人，并于 2010 年接受了阿尔斯特大学校长的礼仪职位。
data.name: 詹姆斯·内斯比特

data.biography:
詹姆斯·內斯比特（James Nesbitt，1965 年 1 月 15 日-），北愛爾蘭演員。內斯比特出生於北愛爾蘭安特里姆郡的巴利米納，在附近的布勞沙恩村長大，然後搬到倫敦德裏郡的科爾雷恩。他想像父親一樣成為一名教師，因此開始在阿爾斯特大學攻讀法語學位。一年後，當他決定成為一名演員時，他輟學了，並轉學到倫敦的中央演媾和戲劇學院。1987 年畢業後，他花了七年時間演出了從音樂劇《屋頂上》（1987 年、1989 年）到政治劇《帕迪瓦克》（1994 年）等各種戲劇。他在《聽我的歌》（1991 年）中扮演藝人經紀人 Fintan O'Donnell 首次亮相。

內斯比特在浪漫喜劇《冷腳》（1998 - 2003）中扮演亞當·威廉姆斯（Adam Williams）獲得了突破性的電視角色，這為他贏得了英國喜劇獎、電視和廣播工業俱樂部獎以及國家電視獎。他的第一個重要電影角色是在《醒來的內德》（1998 年）中飾演養豬場主“豬”芬恩。與其他主演一起，內斯比特獲得了美國演員工會獎的提名。在 Lucky Break （2001） 中，他作為電影主角首次亮相，飾演囚犯吉米·漢茲。第二年，他在電視電影《血腥星期天》中扮演伊萬·庫珀，講述了 1972 年德裏槍擊事件。與他之前的“厚臉皮”角色不同，這部電影是他職業生涯的轉折點。他獲得了英國獨立電影獎，並獲得了英國學院電視獎最佳男主角提名。

內斯比特還出演了《墨菲定律》（2001 - 2007）中的卧底偵探湯米·墨菲（Tommy Murphy），這個角色是由作家科林·貝特曼（Colin Bateman）為他創造的。這個角色兩次獲得愛爾蘭電影電視獎（IFTA）的內斯比特最佳男主角提名。2007 年，他在史蒂文·莫法特（Steven Moffat）的《傑基爾》（Jekyll）中出演了湯姆·傑克曼（Tom Jackman）和海德先生（Mr Hyde）的雙重角色，這為他贏得了 2008 年金球獎提名。此後，內斯比特出演了幾個更具戲劇性的角色。他與聯姆·尼森一起出演了《天堂的五分鐘》（2009 年），並且是電視迷你劇《職業》（2009 年）和《深海》（2010 年）的三位主演之一。他還出演了電影《流浪者》（2010 年）和埃米利奧·埃斯特維茲的《路》（2011 年），並出演了彼得·傑克遜的《霍比特人》（2012/13 年）。

內斯比特與前女演員索尼婭·福布斯 - 亞當結婚，育有兩個女兒。他是眾多慈善機構的贊助人，並於 2010 年接受了阿爾斯特大學校長的禮儀職位。
data.name: 詹姆斯·內斯比特

data.biography:
Ке́трін Ви́нник (англ. Katheryn Winnick, 17 грудня 1977, Етобіко, Канада) — канадська кіно- та телевізійна акторка українського походження.

Катруся Винницька, як її називають у сім'ї, народилася й виросла в Етобіко (з 1998 року район у складі Торонто). Ім'я при народженні — Катерина Анна Винницька. Вільно розмовляє українською мовою — до 8 років спілкувалася тільки нею.

У Торонто відвідувала греко-католицьку церкву та ходила до української недільної школи імені Цьопи Паліїв, здала іспити й є випускником цієї школи. До 17 років належала до «Пласту» — спочатку до 10 гнізда (підрозділу) «Волошки» у новацтві, а згодом до 10 куреня, гурток «Кедри», у юнацтві. Неодноразово була на новацьких таборах сестричкою (вихователем). Також займалася з молодшими пластунами поза табором — вела для них щотижневі заняття, які згодом мусила залишити через брак часу.

Захопившись східними єдиноборствами, досягла неабияких результатів. Має чорний пояс (3-й дан) з тхеквондо та чорний пояс (2-й дан) з карате. Участь у «Пласті» виховала у Кетрін лідерські навички, які дозволили їй започаткувати власну школу бойових мистецтв тхеквондо. На Чемпіонаті Канади з тхеквондо завоювала срібну медаль. Є ліцензованим охоронцем.

Батьки Кетрін є нащадками вихідців з України, обоє народилися в Німеччині, куди в 1940-ві роки їхні родини вимушені були втікали від радянської влади. Незабаром родини з маленькими дітьми перебралися до Канади.

Предки матері Кетрін, Лесі, народилися в Галичині — бабуся на Львівщині, а дідусь на Тернопільщині.

Предки батька Кетрін, Романа, походять зі Старого Самбора і Борислава. Дід Володимир Винницький зголосився до лав Січових Стрільців у 16-річному віці (приписав собі 2 роки, щоб записатися до війська). Після Другої світової війни доклав зусиль до створення організації колишніх Січових Стрільців у Канаді, в якій мав поважні позиції.

Кетрін має двох братів і сестру — Маркіяна, Дарію й Адама.

Акторської майстерності Катерина Винницька навчалася у студії Вільяма Еспера в Нью-Йорку.

Кетрін знялася в багатьох фільмах виробництва студії Paramount Pictures.

Для ролі у фільмі 2009 року «Холодні душі» пройшла експрес-курс з російської мови, щоб зіграти роль Свєти.

Грала головні ролі в декількох телевізійних шоу, в тому числі «Доктор Хаус» (12-а серія третього сезону «Один день, одна кімната»), «Закон і порядок» і «Криміналісти: мислити як злочинець».

2010 року зіграла в комедії «Кілери» режисера Роберта Лукетича, з Ештоном Кутчером у головній ролі.

2012 року Кетрін разом із Куртом Расселом отримала одну з головних ролей у фільмі «Мистецтво крадіжки» режисера Джонатана Собола. Винник грає роль української танцівниці та подруги героя Рассела.

2013 року почала зніматися у канадсько-ірландському популярному телесеріалі «Вікінги» у ролі Лагерти — легендарної постаті в історії вікінгів.

2016 року приєдналася до акторського складу «Темної вежі» — екранізації однойменної серії книг Стівена Кінга в жанрі наукової фантастики, фентезі та жахів.
data.name: Кетрін Винник

data.biography:
Katheryn Winnick (nome artístico de Katerena Anna Vinitska; Etobicoke, 17 de dezembro de 1977)[3] é uma atriz canadense de cinema e televisão, célebre por seus papeis no filme Amusement (2008) e nas séries de televisão Bones (2010), A Glimpse Inside the Mind of Charles Swan III (2012) e Vikings (2013). Em 2013 atuou na comédia The Art of the Steal, com Kurt Russell e Matt Dillon.

Winnick nasceu em Etobicoke, Ontário, e é descendente de ucranianos. Foi criada falando ucraniano, e só começou a falar inglês aos oito anos de idade.Começou a praticar artes marciais aos sete anos de idade, e obteve sua faixa preta aos treze. Com 21 anos já era proprietária de três escolas de artes marciais.

Winnick apareceu em diversos filmes, como Stand Up Guys, de Fisher Stevens, Failure to Launch, de Tom Dey, Love and Other Drugs, de Ed Zwick, e Killers, de Robert Luketic. Também fez participações em diversos produções televisivas, como House M.D. (episódio "One Day, One Room"), The Glades, Bones, Law & Order, Law & Order: Criminal Intent, CSI, CSI: NY, CSI: Miami, Criminal Minds e Nikita. Na série dramática Bones, da FOX, ela interpreta Hannah Burley, uma correspondente de guerra destacada para cobrir a Guerra do Afeganistão e que acaba se apaixonando pelo personagem principal, Seeley Booth.

Winnick estrelou, juntamente com Paul Giamatti, a comédia dramática Cold Souls, que teve sua estreia mundial no Festival de Cinema de Sundance em 2009.

Em 2011 foi convidada para participar na série de espionagem Nikita, do canal The CW, no qual interpretou Kelly, uma ex-parceira durona da personagem principal.

Em 2013 estrelou A Glimpse Inside the Mind of Charles Swan III, de Roman Coppola, no qual interpretou a ex-namorada de Charlie Sheen, e apareceu na comédia The Art of the Steal, interpretando a namorada de Kurt Russell. Também faz parte do elenco da série Vikings, do History, no papel de Lagertha, uma figura lendária da história viking.

Fonte: Wikipédia

Katheryn Winnick est une actrice canadienne, née le 17 décembre 1977 à Etobicoke (Ontario). Elle est d'ascendance ukrainienne. Pendant son enfance et jusqu'à ses huit ans, elle ne parle qu'ukrainien et apprend l'anglais à partir de cet âge. Elle commence à recevoir une formation dans les arts martiaux à sept ans et obtient sa première ceinture noire à l'âge de treize ans. À 21 ans, elle maîtrise trois styles d'arts martiaux différents. Avant d'entamer une carrière d'actrice, elle est garde du corps, ce qui de son aveu lui a été très utile pour son rôle dans la série Vikings.

Katheryn débute sa carrière en 1999 dans un épisode de Psi Factor, chroniques du paranormal qui lui permet de se faire remarquer à la télévision. Elle participe alors à Student Bodies et multiplie les rôles dans des téléfilms, et surtout dans les séries à succès New York Section criminelle, Oz, Les experts, Missing: disparus sans laisser de trace, Esprits Criminels ou encore Dr House qui lui assurent une certaine reconnaissance auprès du public américain.

Au début des années 2000, la jeune femme joue dans des comédies romantiques populaires, aux côtés d’acteurs de renom tel que Hugh Grant et Sandra Bullock dans L’amour sans préavis, ou Adam Sandler et Drew Barrymore pour Amour & amnésie. Son talent de comédienne se confirme, et elle enchaîne alors les romcoms grand public en 2010 avec Ashton Kutcher et Katherine Heigl dans Kiss & Kill, ou encore les prestigieux Jake Gyllenhaal et Anne Hathaway pour Love, et autres drogues. La canadienne revient la même année à la télévision pour interpréter Hannah Burley, la journaliste et petite amie de l’agent spécial Seeley Booth, dans la sixième saison de Bones. Elle participe également aux séries d’action Nikita et Le Transporteur adapté du film éponyme produit par Luc Besson. Mais l’actrice a aussi joué les victimes dans des films d’horreurs, et notamment dans le huitième opus de l’une des sagas les plus cultes du cinéma d’épouvante, à savoir Hellraiser.

En 2012, elle est repérée par Roman Coppola pour interpréter Ivana dans Dans la tête de Charles Swan III, rôle qui confirme son talent de séductrice. Cette importante expérience cinématographique lui permet de rejoindre Al Pacino et Christopher Walken dans Les derniers affranchis, de Fisher Stevens (Lost - Les disparus). L’année suivante, elle incarne Lola dans The Art of the Steal, un film de gangsters parodique avec Kurt Russell et Matt Dillon.

Mais l’actrice doit sa célébrité à la série Vikings dans laquelle elle incarne la guerrière Lagertha, l’épouse de Ragnar Lothbrok joué par Travis Fimmel.

Winnick nació en Etobicoke, Ontario. De ascendencia ucraniana, habla con fluidez varios idiomas: ucraniano, ruso, francés, italiano e inglés.

Comenzó a entrenarse en artes marciales a los 7 años y logró su primer cinturón negro a los 13. Es cinturón negro (tercer dan) en taekwondo, cinturón negro (segundo dan) en karate, y guardaespaldas con licencia. Gracias a sus escuelas de artes marciales, comenzó a entrenar actores y actrices, lo que le permitió ingresar en el ambiente.

Кэтрин Винник  — канадская актриса украинского происхождения. Известна исполнением роли Лагерты в канадском сериале «Викинги».

Кэтрин Винник — украинского происхождения, владеет украинским языком, так как до восьми лет разговаривала только на нём. Родители — Роман Винницкий и Леся Винницкая (функционер Конгресса украинцев Канады в Торонто). Предки Кэтрин — родом из Галиции, в 1940-х годах они бежали от советских властей, мать и отец Кэтрин родились в Германии, а затем семья эмигрировала в Канаду. Дедушка Кэтрин, Владимир Винницкий, был сечевым стрельцом, после войны стал организатором ветеранской организации сечевых стрельцов. У Кэтрин есть два брата — Маркиян и Адам, сестра Дарья, все они родились в Канаде.

Кэтрин с 6 до 17 лет состояла в украинской скаутской организации «Пласт», училась в украинской школе в Торонто, провинция Онтарио, а также посещала украинскую католическую церковь. После «Пласта» она начала серьёзно заниматься тхэквондо. «Я хотела драться с мальчиками», отметила она. Участие в скаутском движении стало основой её воспитания, сказала Винник, выработало у неё дисциплину, соблюдение режима и помогло в обучении тхэквондо.

Актёрский дебют Кэтрин состоялся в 1999 году. Училась актёрскому мастерству в студии Уильяма Эспера в Нью-Йорке.

Она снималась во многих фильмах производства студии Paramount Pictures. В 2010 году она сыграла в комедии «Киллеры» режиссёра Роберта Лукетича. Кэтрин играла главные роли в нескольких телевизионных шоу, в том числе «Доктор Хаус» (эпизод «Один день, одна комната»), «Закон и порядок» и «Криминалисты: мыслить как преступник». С 2013 года снимается в сериале «Викинги».

Cеребряный призёр чемпионата Канады по тхэквондо. Имеет чёрный пояс 3 дан по тхэквондо, 2 дан по каратэ. Является лицензированным телохранителем.

data.biography:
Katheryn Winnick 1977. december 17-én született az Ontario tartománybeli Etobicoke-ban, Kanadában. Két fivére van, Adam, aki jelenleg Afganisztánban szolgál, illetve Markjan, aki Katherynhez hasonlóan színészként tevékenykedik. Családja ukrán származású, így anyanyelve is eredetileg az ukrán - mindössze 8 éves korában kezdett el megismerkedni az angollal. Hétéves korátol kezdve aktívan űz számos küzdősportot, többek között taekwondót és karatét is, 13 éves korában pedig megszerezte első feketeövét. 16 éves korában nyitotta első harcművészetre koncentrált iskoláját Win Kai néven, majd 21 éves korára három ehhez hasonló tanintézet tulajdonosa volt.

A küzdősportok mellett komolyabban érdeklődött a színészet iránt is, ezért New Yorkba költözött és a William Esper Studióban tanult színművészetet, ahol egyébként olyan neves színészeket képeztek, mint Kim Basinger, Kathy Bates és Calista Flockhart.

Katheryn Winnick (* 17. Dezember 1977 in Etobicoke, Ontario als Katerena Anna Vinitska) ist eine kanadische Schauspielerin.

Ihre erste größere Rolle hatte sie 1999 in Student Bodies, wo sie wie auch in dem Film Und Nietzsche weinte mit Jamie Elman vor der Kamera stand. Winnick nahm Schauspielunterricht in William Esper’s Studio in New York City, bevor sie nach Los Angeles zog. In der ABC-Filmbiographie über Donald Trump verkörperte sie Ivana Trump. Für ihre Rolle im Film Daddy’s Little Girl wurde Winnick auf dem New York International Independent Film and Video Festival mit einem Short Film Award in der Kategorie Beste Schauspielerin (Best Actress) ausgezeichnet.

Ab 2013 spielte sie die Hauptrolle der Lagertha Lothbrok in der kanadisch-irischen Fernsehserie Vikings, deren Ende nach der 6. Staffel im Januar 2019 verkündet wurde.

2019 übernahm sie in der ersten Staffel der Netflix-Serie Wu Assassins die Rolle der Undercoverermittlerin Christine "CG" Gavin. Neben ihrem Darstellerkollegen Iko Uwais war sie auch als Ko-Produzent an der Serie beteiligt und führte bei einer Episode die Regie.

Quelle: Wikipedia

Katherine Vinnik rođena je 17. prosinca 1977. u obitelji Ukrajinaca. Do školske dobi znala je samo ukrajinski jezik, iako je živjela u Torontu. Katherine roditelji su Roman i Lesya Vinnitsa. Sredinom 20. stoljeća Vinnikovi preci pobjegli su od sovjetske vlasti. Otac i majka glumice rodom su iz Njemačke. Potom je obitelj emigrirala u Kanadu. Katherine nije jedino dijete. Ima braću Markiyan i Adama, kao i sestru Daria.

(كاترينا آنا فينيتسكا) ممثلة كندية. ولدت في أيتوبيكوك بأونتاريو من أصل أوكراني وتحدثت الأوكرانية كلغتها الأولى ولم تبدأ في التحدث بالإنجليزية حتى كانت في الثامنة من عمرها. بدأت في ممارسة رياضات الدفاع عن النفس حين كانت في السابعة وحين بلغت سن الواحدة والعشرين كانت قد ارتادت ثلاث مدارس للدفاع عن النفس. ظهرت في عدة أفلام منها Amusement و A Glimpse Inside the Mind of Charles Swan III من إخراج (رومان كوبولا) _نجل مخرج العرّاب (فرانسيس فورد كوبولا)_ و The Art of the Steal ومسلسلات منها Bones و Transporter: The Series. دورها في مسلسل (Bones): (العظام) هو (هانا بيرلي) مراسلة صحافية يتم إرسالها لتغطية الحرب في أفغانستان وتدخل في علاقة حب مع بطل العمل (سيلي بوث). أيضًا انضمت لفريق عمل فيلم (Vikings) بدور (لاجيرثا) وهي شخصية أسطورية في تاريخ الفايكنج.

data.biography: Katheryn Winnick jest kanadyjską aktorką. Znana jest z głównych ról w serialach telewizyjnych Vikings, Wu Assassins, Big Sky i powracającej roli w serialu telewizyjnym Bones.

Katheryn Winnick, 17 Aralık 1977 tarihinde Kanada'nın Ontario eyaletindeki Etobicoke şehrinde, Ukrayna kökenli bir ailenin çocuğu olarak dünyaya gelmiştir. Anadili İngilizce'nin yanı sıra akıcı bir şekilde Ukraynaca konuşabilen Winnick, köklerine derin bir bağlılık duymaktadır. Küçük yaşlardan itibaren spora ve özellikle dövüş sanatlarına büyük ilgi gösteren Winnick, 7 yaşında Taekwondo'ya başlamış ve 13 yaşında ilk siyah kuşağını almıştır. Dövüş sanatlarındaki yeteneğini ilerleterek hem Taekwondo hem de Karatede siyah kuşak sahibi olmuş, hatta 21 yaşına geldiğinde kendi adını taşıyan üç dövüş sanatı okulunun kuruculuğunu üstlenmiştir. Aynı zamanda lisanslı bir koruma (bodyguard) olması, onun fiziksel yeteneklerini ve disiplinini göstermektedir.

Başlangıçta üniversitede Kinesiyoloji (hareket bilimi) eğitimi almayı planlasa da, oyunculuk tutkusu ağır basmış ve kariyerini bu yönde şekillendirmeye karar vermiştir. 1990'ların sonlarında ve 2000'lerin başlarında çeşitli televizyon dizilerinde konuk oyuncu olarak ("Law & Order", "CSI: Miami", "House" gibi) ve bazı sinema filmlerinde ("Two Weeks Notice", "Failure to Launch", "Killers", "Love & Other Drugs") roller alarak sektöre adım atmıştır. 2010-2011 yıllarında "Bones" dizisinde canlandırdığı gazeteci Hannah Burley karakteriyle daha geniş kitlelerce tanınmaya başlamıştır.

Katheryn Winnick'in kariyerindeki en büyük çıkış, 2013 yılında başlayan ve dünya çapında fenomen haline gelen History Channel dizisi "Vikings" ile gerçekleşmiştir. Dizide canlandırdığı Lagertha karakteri; efsanevi bir kalkan-kadın (shield-maiden), bilge bir lider, Kontes ve Kraliçe olarak, Winnick'in uluslararası düzeyde tanınmasını sağlamıştır. Lagertha'nın gücü, kararlılığı, zekası ve karmaşık doğası, Winnick'in nüanslı ve güçlü performansıyla hayat bulmuş ve karakter, modern televizyonun en ikonik kadın figürlerinden biri haline gelmiştir. Winnick, dövüş sanatları geçmişini bu rolde ustalıkla kullanmış ve karakterin fiziksel gerekliliklerini başarıyla yerine getirmiştir. Dizinin altı sezonu boyunca merkezi karakterlerden biri olan Winnick, aynı zamanda dizinin altıncı sezonunda ("Valhalla Can Wait" bölümü) yönetmenlik koltuğuna oturarak yeni bir yeteneğini de sergilemiştir.

"Vikings"in ardından Winnick, kariyerine başarılı projelerle devam etmiştir. Netflix yapımı "Wu Assassins" (2019) dizisinde rol almış ve bir bölümünü yönetmiştir. 2020'den 2023'e kadar ABC'nin suç draması dizisi "Big Sky"da başrollerden biri olan özel dedektif Jenny Hoyt karakterini canlandırmıştır. Sinema tarafında ise "The Dark Tower" (2017), "Polar" (2019) ve Liam Neeson ile başrolü paylaştığı "The Marksman" (2021) gibi filmlerde yer almıştır.

Katheryn Winnick, özellikle canlandırdığı güçlü, bağımsız ve mücadeleci kadın karakterlerle öne çıkan, dövüş sanatları geçmişini performanslarına yansıtan yetenekli bir aktristir. Etkileyici ekran duruşu ve rollerine olan bağlılığıyla tanınan Winnick, hem oyunculuk hem de yönetmenlik alanında aktif olarak kariyerini sürdürmektedir.
data.name: Katheryn Winnick

data.biography: Lara Jean Chorostecki is a Canadian actress. She has played Fredricka "Freddie" Lounds in the American psychological thriller–horror television series Hannibal, and Sergeant Krystina Breeland in the Canadian series X Company.
data.name: Lara Jean Chorostecki

data.biography:
Lara Jean Chorostecki, 24 Eylül 1984 tarihinde Brampton, Ontario, Kanada'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Polonya ve İskoç kökenli olan Chorostecki, oyunculuk tutkusunu erken yaşlarda keşfetti ve Kanada'nın en prestijli tiyatro kurumlarından biri olan Stratford, Ontario'daki Birmingham Klasik Tiyatro Eğitimi Konservatuvarı'nda ileri düzeyde eğitim aldı. Kariyerine, saygın Stratford Festivali'nde sahneye çıkarak başladı ve burada klasik tiyatrodaki yeteneklerini sergiledi.

Televizyon kariyerindeki ilk uluslararası rollerinden birini Starz kanalının tarihi fantastik dizisi "Camelot"ta (2011) canlandırdı. Ancak onu dünya çapında izleyicilerin zihnine kazıyan ve kariyerinde bir dönüm noktası olan rol, Bryan Fuller'ın eleştirmenlerce beğenilen kült dizisi "Hannibal"da (2013-2015) canlandırdığı Freddie Lounds karakteri oldu. Thomas Harris'in "Kızıl Ejder" romanındaki karakterin modern ve cinsiyeti değiştirilmiş bir versiyonu olan Freddie, TattleCrime.com adlı web sitesini yöneten, kızıl saçlı, hırslı ve ahlaki sınırları esnek bir magazin gazetecisiydi. Dizideki ana karakterler için sürekli bir baş belası olan ve sansasyon için her şeyi yapabilen bu karakteri canlandırması, onu dizinin en unutulmaz figürlerinden biri yaptı.

"Hannibal"daki başarısının ardından Chorostecki, kariyerinde önemli bir adım atarak CBC'nin İkinci Dünya Savaşı casusluk draması "X Company"de (2015-2017) başrollerden birini üstlendi. Bu dizide, Müttefik casus ekibinin kilit üyelerinden Krystina Breeland'i canlandırdı. Ayrıca "Designated Survivor" ve Amazon Prime'ın popüler dizisi "Reacher" gibi yapımlarda tekrar eden roller üstlenerek televizyondaki varlığını sürdürdü.

Oyunculuk kariyerinin yanı sıra, "Assassin's Creed" gibi popüler video oyunu serilerinde seslendirme de yapan Lara Jean Chorostecki, hem sahnede hem de ekranda zeki, kararlı ve genellikle ahlaki olarak karmaşık karakterleri başarıyla canlandıran çok yönlü bir sanatçı olarak tanınmaktadır.

曾一萱，苗族，毕业于北京电影学院，中国内地女演员。

2013年因在文艺电影《天将场》中饰演幺姑而崭露头角 ；2014年主演革命题材剧《海棠依旧》，饰演周恩来侄女周秉德，随后在古装清宫剧《大玉儿传奇》饰演绿珠；2015年出演抗战剧《最后的战士》，同年主演民国偶像传奇电视剧《百战天狼》；2016年拍摄抗战剧《飞哥战队》及古装宫斗剧《如懿传》；2021年11月，出演电视剧《风起西州》。

data.biography:
Dania Jissell Ramirez (born November 8, 1979) is a Dominican actress. Her credits include the roles of Nikki Batista on Alert: Missing Persons Unit, Rosie Falta on Lifetime's Devious Maids, Maya Herrera in Heroes, Alex in Entourage, Blanca on the last season of The Sopranos, and Cinderella on the last season of ABC's Once Upon a Time. Her film roles include Alex Guerrero in She Hate Me and Callisto in the feature film X-Men: The Last Stand.

She has made appearances in numerous music videos for artists such as LL Cool J, De La Soul, Santana, and Wisin & Yandel. She has acted in TV shows Buffy the Vampire Slayer, Heroes, 10-8: Officers on Duty, Entourage, and The Sopranos. In 1997, she was an extra in the HBO film Subway Stories, which led to her encountering filmmaker Spike Lee. He would later direct her in her film debut playing Daphne in 25th Hour (2002), as well as in She Hate Me (2004). Other films she has starred in include X-Men: The Last Stand (2006), Quarantine (2008), Cross Bronx (2004), and Premium Rush (2012).

Born in Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic, from an early age she knew her calling to be an actress. As a child, she enjoyed reenacting telenovelas for her relatives. A modeling scout saw her working in a store at the age of 15, which led to her first acting job, in an ad for soda. She later apprenticed in the Actor's Workshop in N.Y.C. She then relocated to L.A. to develop her acting ambition.
data.name: Dania Ramirez

data.biography:
Dania Ramírez es una actriz dominicana, nacionalizada estadounidense. Apareció en tres episodios de la serie de televisión Buffy la cazavampiros interpretando a Caridad, una cazadora potencial. En la película X-Men: The Last Stand encarnó a Callisto y en la sexta temporada en la serie de HBO Los Soprano interpretó a Blanca Selgado, una madre soltera con un hijo de 3 años llamado Héctor. En la serie de televisión Héroes encarnó a Maya Herrera. También participó en el vídeo musical del rapero LL Cool J, "Hush", que fue dirigido por su novio, Jessy Terrero, y en el video de "Dime qué te pasó" del dúo de reguetón Wisin & Yandel.

Recientemente se la vio en el vídeo Into the night, del grupo Santana, que protagonizó junto a Freddy Rodríguez.

En el 2010 trabajó en la 7ª temporada de Entourage de HBO.

En el año 2012 apareció en la película American Pie: el reencuentro, interpretando el papel de Selena. Actualmente trabaja en la serie Devious Maids como la criada Rosie.

Masako Nozawa is a Japanese actress and voice actress from Tokyo. Throughout her life, she has been affiliated with Production Baobab, 81 Produce and self-owned Office Nozawa; she is currently affiliated with Aoni Production. Her late husband, Masaaki Tsukada, was also a voice actor.

As a voice actress, she is best known for the role of Son Goku in the popular anime franchise Dragon Ball, as well as all of Goku's male family relatives (except Raditz) and the villainous Goku Black. She has also voiced Tetsurō Hoshino (Galaxy Express 999) and Kitarō (GeGeGe no Kitarō, first and second series). In addition, she has also voiced two separate characters named "Hiroshi"; a character in Dokonjō Gaeru, and the characters known in the U.S. as "Pidge" and "Haggar" in Hyakujūō Golion. She also voiced Doraemon in the 1973 anime, replacing male actor Kōsei Tomita, who voiced the character in the first 26 episodes. In the 1979 anime, she was replaced by Nobuyo Ōyama, however Masako voiced Doraemon again in a 1988 special entitled Early English with Doraemon for unknown reasons.
data.name: Masako Nozawa

data.biography: Masako Nozawa (野沢 雅子 Nozawa Masako, Tokio, 25 de octubre de 1936), nombre de casada Masako Tsukada (塚田 雅子 Tsukada Masako) es una veterana actriz y seiyū japonesa, conocida por ser la voz de Goku en la saga Dragon Ball.​ El 1 de abril de 2006, renunció de 81 Produce para establecer Office Nozawa.

data.biography: 野泽雅子（日语：野沢 雅子／のざわ まさこ Nozawa Masako，1936年10月25日—）出生于日本东京都荒川区日暮里，8岁－18岁住在群马县沼田市，现在则住在横滨市，是日本舞台演员、声优。本名冢田雅子（旧姓：野泽），她的丈夫是日本声优冢田正昭，身高157公分，血型O型，星座是天蝎座，原本隶属于自己独立创立的事务所“オフィス野沢”（office-nozawa）（已于2012年4月结束营运）。剧团“月光”主宰。叔母佐佐木清野为松竹蒲田的女优。父亲是诚和画廊的画家野泽蓼洲（りょうしゅう）。活动时期是1950年至今。代表作为龙珠系列（孙悟空、孙悟饭、孙悟天、巴达克、达列斯），2017年获得吉尼斯世界纪录成为龙珠游戏系列配音最久的两项纪录。2025年10月17日，野泽雅子被选为文化功劳者，是史上第一位声优界获此殊荣的人。
data.name: 野泽雅子

Michał Żurawski urodził się 2 lipca 1979 roku w Zabrzu. Ma młodszego brata Piotra, który też jest aktorem. Rodzina jego matki pochodzi ze Śląska, a ojca – z Kresów. Ma pochodzenie żydowskie.

Jest absolwentem IV Liceum Ogólnokształcącego im. Marii Skłodowskiej-Curie w Chorzowie (1994–1998). Jego talent aktorski ujawnił się w trakcie nauki w liceum podczas organizowanego corocznie Tygodnia Kulturalnego (inscenizacje przedstawień teatralnych, kabarety przygotowywane przez uczniów). Choć planował studiowanie na Akademii Sztuk Pięknych w Krakowie, ostatecznie podjął studia w Akademii Teatralnej w Warszawie, które ukończył w 2002 roku. Zadebiutował na ekranie w 2002 rolą epizodyczną w serialu "Na dobre i na złe". W kolejnych latach grał epizodyczne lub drugoplanowe role w popularnych serialach telewizyjnych, takich jak "Samo życie", "Na Wspólnej", "Kryminalni", "Egzamin z życia", "Ojciec Mateusz" i "Strażacy". Do jego większych ról filmowych można zaliczyć grę w produkcjach: "W ciemności" (2011), "Kac Wawa" (2011), "Jeziorak", "Miasto 44" (2014), "Karbala" (2015) i "Jestem mordercą" (2016). W listopadzie 2020 roku miał premierę serial "Król", w którym zagrał rolę tytułową. (Na podstawie Wikipedii)
data.name: Michał Żurawski

谭咏麟（1950年8月23日－） 绰号“谭校长”，为已故足球名宿谭江柏之子，生于香港，籍贯广东新会，是香港知名粤语流行曲歌手与电影演员。曾为失败者乐队成员，1973年任温拿乐队主音歌手，1979年单飞后推出首张个人专辑《反斗星》，是于1980至1990年代的香港乐坛巨星，曾在1984至1987年度香港“十大劲歌金曲颁奖礼”上连续四届获得“最受欢迎男歌星”奖，1996年在香港十大中文金曲颁奖礼上获得金针奖。当被问及有关年龄问题时，他常自称“年年皆为二十五岁”。谭咏麟擅长演唱浪漫情歌，代表作有《爱在深秋》、《雾之恋》、《爱的根源》等。
data.name: 谭咏麟

data.biography:
Alan Tam Wing-Lun MH (traditional Chinese: 譚詠麟; simplified Chinese: 谭咏麟; pinyin: Tán Yǒnglín; Cantonese Yale: Taam4 Wing6Leon4; born 23 August 1950) is a Hong Kong singer and actor. He played a major role in developing the Cantopop scene in the 1980s as he was known for singing romantic ballads with modern arrangements. From 1983 to 1987, Alan Tam received numerous music awards and won Most Popular Male Artist and IFPI Award for successive four years, which made him the most famous superstar singer of Hong Kong in 1980s. In early 1988, he publicly quit all pop music award ceremonies and put most efforts in searching new direction for Cantopop music. He is also a members of The Wynners, along with Kenny Bee, Bennett Pang Kin-San, Danny Yip Chi-Keung and Anthony Chan Yau.

Today, he is still active in the music and film industry, releasing new albums on a regular basis. Since the late 1980s, he has served as a mentor for the cantopop music industry, earning the nickname the "Principal" or "Principal Tam". Today he is regularly seen across the media in Hong Kong, mainland China, Taiwan, and various parts of East Asia participating in all types of entertainment-related events and charity activities. As of 2013, Alan Tam has launched a total of 115 solo albums and has sold over 35 million records worldwide; he also holds the record for having held the most concerts in Hong Kong as a solo artist.
data.name: Alan Tam

data.biography: 譚詠麟（1950 年 8 月 23 日－） 綽號“譚校長”，為已故足球名宿譚江柏之子，生於香港，籍貫廣東新會，是香港知名粵語流行曲歌手與電影演員。曾為失敗者樂隊成員，1973 年任温拿樂隊主音歌手，1979 年單飛後推出首張個人專輯《反鬥星》，是於 1980 至 1990 年代的香港樂壇巨星，曾在 1984 至 1987 年度香港“十大勁歌金曲頒獎禮”上聯續四屆獲得“最受歡迎男歌星”獎，1996 年在香港十大中文金曲頒獎禮上獲得金針獎。當被問及有關年齡問題時，他常自稱“年年皆為二十五歲”。譚詠麟擅長演唱浪漫情歌，代表作有《愛在深秋》、《霧之戀》、《愛的根源》等。
data.name: 譚詠麟

data.biography:
Heather Joan Graham (* 29. Januar 1970 in Milwaukee, Wisconsin) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin.

Graham ist die Tochter von Joan Graham (geborene Bransfield), einer Lehrerin und bekannten Kinderbuchautorin, und James Graham, einem FBI-Agenten im Ruhestand. Sie wuchs in einem streng katholischen Haushalt auf, entfremdete sich jedoch von der Kirche. Ihre jüngere Schwester Aimee ist ebenfalls Schauspielerin.

Mit dem Erreichen der Volljährigkeit fasste Graham den Entschluss, sich auf die Unterhaltungsbranche zu konzentrieren, und bekam kurze Zeit später eine Rolle in Daddy’s Cadillac. Es folgten zahlreiche weitere Filme und Fernsehsendungen, bis sie in Paul Thomas Andersons Boogie Nights den großen Durchbruch schaffte. Graham wurde 1999 von der Entertainment Weekly zum It-Girl gekürt, der heißesten Schauspielerin der Welt.

Ihre deutsche Standard-Synchronsprecherin ist Katrin Fröhlich.

Heather Graham (Vera) már egészen korán vonzódott a színészet iránt. A filmesek Gus Van Sant „A gyógyszertári cowboy” (Drugstore Cowboys) filmjében figyeltek fel rá, amelyér Independent Spirit jelölést kapott. Graham folytatta felejthetetlen játékát az 1997-es klasszikus „Boogie Nights”-al, amelyért az MTV Movie Awards Legjobb Áttörő Játék díját nyerte el, játszott továbbá az 1999-es „Kicsikém - Sir Austin Powers 2.” (Austin Powers: The Spy Who Shagged Me) filmben és Bradley Cooper és Zach Galifinakis oldalán a 2009-es „Másnaposok” (The Hangover) filmben is.

Legutóbb a „Half Magic” kedélyeket borzoló szex vígjátékban láthatuk, amit Graham írt, rendezett és producerelt. Graham Ellen Burstyn oldalán játszott a Lifetime „Flowers in The Attic” és folytatásában, a „Petals in The Wind” filmekben. Szerepelt továbbá az „If There Be Thorns” harmadik részében, amit 2015 tavaszán mutattak be, és csatlakozott a Showtime „Kaliforgia” (Californication) hetedik szezonjához is, amiben Hank (David Duchovny) egyik régi nőjét játsza, aki totál felforgatja Hank életét.

Májusban 2013 Graham újra Jade szerepébe bújt a népszerű vígjáték, a „Másnaposok 3” (The Hangover 3) kedvéért. Játszott Ramin Bahrani oldalán a „Mindenáron” (At Any Price) filmben is, ami a torontoi és a velencei filmfesztiválokon debütált.

Karrierje során, Graham együtt dolgozott az iparág legelismertebb rendezőivel és színészeivel. Szerepei közé tartozik az őzike szemű lány a „Bérbarátok” (Swingers) filmből, ahol Jon Favreau és Vince Vaughn oldalán játszott; az ambiciózus fiatal színésznő Frank Oz „Fergeteges forgatás” (Bowfinger) filmjéből, Steve Martin és Eddie Murphy mellett; és a tragikus Mary Kelly az Albert és Allen Hughes „A pokolból” (From Hell) filmjéből Johnny Depp oldalán. További szerepei: „A Guru” (The Guru) Marisa Tomei mellett; „Nő előttem, nő utánam” (Hope Springs) Colin Firth-el; a „Férjfogó” (Committed) Luke Wilson oldalán; Ed Burns „Sidewalks of New York”, Robert Downey Jr oldalán az „Egy fiú, két lány” (Two Girls and a Guy); a „Lost in Space - Elveszve az űrben” (Lost in Space) Gary Oldman és William Hurt mellett; és a „6szoros ölelés” (Six Degrees of Separation) filmben Will Smith oldalán. Graham főproducerelte és játszott a „Cake” c. filmben. 2004 – 2005-ben, lelkes kritikákat kapott vendég szerepléséért az NBC Scrubs sorozatában. Színházi debütálása a Playwrights Horizons „Recent Tragic Events” darabban volt.

Heather Joan Graham (29 de enero de 1970) es una actriz estadounidense. Después de aparecer en anuncios de televisión, su primer papel protagónico en un largometraje llegó con la comedia adolescente License to Drive (1988), seguida de la película aclamada por la crítica Drugstore Cowboy (1989), que obtuvo reconocimiento de la industria. Luego interpretó papeles secundarios en películas como Shout (1991), Diggstown (1992), Six Degrees of Separation (1993), Swingers (1996) y en la serie Twin Peaks (1991) y su precuela Twin Peaks: Fire Walk with Me antes de obtener el elogio crítico en la película de Paul Thomas Anderson Boogie Nights (1997) como Brandy / Rollergirl. En 1999 actuó en Bowfinger y Austin Powers: The Spy Who Shagged Me.

En la década de 2000, Graham actuó las películas Committed (2000), Say It Isn't So (2001), Mary (2005), Gray Matters (2007), The Hangover (2009) y su secuela, The Hangover Part III (2013). También tuvo un papel en la serie Scrubs en 2004, antes de interpretar el personaje principal en la serie Emily's Reasons Why Not en 2006. También tuvo papeles recurrentes en la serie de Showtime Californication (2014) y la serie de Netflix Flaked (2016).

Conocida por retratar personajes con atractivo sexual, a menudo aparece en listas de revistas de mujeres "Más bellas" y "Más atractivas. Es una defensora pública de Children International.

Jej matka była nauczycielką, a ojciec agentem FBI. Państwo Graham byli katolikami. Heather ma siostrę Aimee Graham. Swoje aktorskie powołanie odkryła już w szkole średniej. Była przewodniczącą kółka teatralnego. Po osiągnięciu pełnoletności wyprowadziła się z domu do Los Angeles i tam zaczęła grywać epizody w filmach m.in. w "Narkotykowy kowboj". Jej kariera nie rozwijała się tak szybko jak ona tego pragnęła, więc postanowiła studiować na University of California w Los Angeles. Tam zauważył ją aktor James Woods i zaproponował jej rolę w filmie "Pojedynek oszustów". Heather rzuciła studia po dwóch latach i zajęła się swoją karierą. W serialu "Miasteczko Twin Peaks" Davida Lyncha zagrała byłą zakonnicę, w której zakochuje się agent Cooper (Kyle MacLachlan). W "Boogie Nights" zagrała gwiazdkę porno.Spotykała się z Kylem MacLachlanem, Jamesem Woodsem i Edwardem Burnsem. Przez jakiś czas pracowała jako modelka Emanuela Ungaro.
data.name: Heather Graham

En 1999 actuó en Bowfinger y Austin Powers: The Spy Who Shagged Me.

Diplômée en 1988 de la Agoura High School, en Californie, Heather Graham abandonne ses études à l'Université de Los Angeles pour se consacrer au métier de comédienne comme sa soeur Aimee Graham. Travaillant comme mannequin pour Emanuel Ungaro Liberte, elle s'illustre dans des spots publicitaires puis se produit sur les planches avec les pièces The Cave dwellers, The Time of your life ou encore Les Sorcières de Salem. En 1987, Heather Graham figure au générique du téléfilm Student exchange et fait ses premières apparitions au cinéma dans de nombreuses comédies : License to drive (1988) de Greg Beeman, Jumeaux (1988) d'Ivan Reitman, Je t'aime à te tuer (1990) de Lawrence Kasdan.

Parallèlement, l'actrice joue dans des films à tonalité plus dramatique : Drugstore cowboy (1989) de Gus Van Sant, qui lui vaut d'être nommée pour l'Independant Spirit Award du meilleur second rôle, Even cowgirls get the blues (1993) du même Gus Van Sant, Twin Peaks (1992) de David Lynch, où elle retrouve le personnage d'Annie Blackburn qu'elle avait créé dans la série télévisée du même nom, Six degrés de séparation (1993) de Fred Schepisi ou encore Mrs Parker et le cercle vicieux (1994) d'Alan Rudolph.

Dès 1997, Heather Graham accède au rang de star en dévoilant ses charmes dans Boogie nights de Paul Thomas Anderson, en incarnant la partenaire sexy du déjanté agent secret dans Austin Powers - l'espion qui m'a tirée (1999) de Jay Roach et en interprétant une jeune comédienne prête à tout pour faire du cinéma dans Bowfinger, roi d'Hollywood (id.) de Frank Oz. Promis à un bel avenir, elle se voit décerner au ShoWest 1999 le titre de Star Féminine de Demain.

Charmant tour à tour Johnny Depp dans From hell (2002), Edward Burns dans Rencontres à Manhattan (id.) et Joseph Fiennes dans Feu de glace (id.), Heather Graham retrouve de temps à autre l'un de ces personnages sexys qui lui ont apporté la gloire, comme celui de l'actrice porno Sharonna dans la comédie Le Gourou et les femmes (2003). Remarquée en 2004 par Abel Ferrara, elle décroche le rôle d'Elisabeth, la compagne du journaliste campé par Forest Whitaker, dans son religieux Mary. La même année, elle interprète le Dr. Molly Clock, dans la saison 4 de la série télévisée Scrubs.

Mais les films dans lesquels elle s'affiche ensuite passent pour la plupart inaperçus, amoindrissant ainsi sérieusement sa notoriété (Mariage et pièce montée, 2005 ; Boogie Woogie, 2008 ; Father of Invention, 2009 ; The flying machine, 2011). Le public international la redécouvre cependant dans la comédie déjantée Very Bad Trip, où elle incarne Jade, une strip-teaseuse qui travaille à Las Vegas. Un rôle qu'elle retrouve dans le dernier volet de la trilogie (Very Bad Trip 3, 2013), toujours aux côtés du trio Bradley Cooper, Zach Galifianakis et Ed Helms.

（Heather Graham） 是一位出生于威斯康星州密尔沃基的才华横溢的演员，因其在银幕上的迷人表演而声名鹊起。她的职业生涯因在《Boogie Nights》和《Austin Powers： The Spy Who Shagged Me》等电影中扮演令人难忘的角色而起飞，展示了她的多才多艺和魅力。格雷厄姆能够体现从喜剧到戏剧等各种类型的不同角色，巩固了她作为多才多艺且受人尊敬的演员的地位。除了在银幕上的成功，她还涉足编剧和导演领域，进一步展示了她在娱乐业的多方面才华。她对自己手艺的奉献精神和在好莱坞的持久存在使她成为观众和同行中受人尊敬的人物。

data.biography: Heather Graham (nata il 29 gennaio 1970), attrice di talento nata a Milwaukee, Wisconsin, è diventata famosa grazie alle sue interpretazioni affascinanti sullo schermo. La sua carriera decollò con ruoli memorabili in film come "Boogie Nights" e "Austin Powers: The Spy Who Shagged Me", che dimostravano la sua versatilità e il suo fascino. La capacità di Graham di incarnare personaggi diversi di generi, dalla commedia al dramma, la consolidò come un'attrice versatile e stimata. Oltre al successo sullo schermo, si è anche avventurata nella scrittura e nella regia, mostrando ulteriormente il suo talento poliedrico nell'industria dell'intrattenimento. La sua dedizione al mestiere e la sua presenza duratura a Hollywood l'hanno resa una figura rispettata sia dal pubblico che dai pari.

Catherine Anne O'Hara (March 4, 1954 - January 30, 2026) was a Canadian-American actress and comedienne, who began her career at Second City Theatre in Toronto. She gained fame on SCTV alongside comedy icons like Rick Moranis and John Candy. Known for roles in films like "After Hours," "Beetlejuice," "Home Alone," and "The Nightmare Before Christmas," she was also renowned for her work in Christopher Guest's mockumentaries. Her versatility extends to voicing Grandma Frump in "The Addams Family."  O'Hara received a Lifetime Artistic Achievement Award at the Governor General's Performance Arts Awards in 2020 and a Golden Globe in 2021 for her role in "Schitt's Creek," and two career Emmy Awards (one for Outstanding Writing "SCTV Network" in 1982 and one for Outstanding Lead Actress for "Schitt's Creek" in 2020). Her final roles were in the television series "The Last of Us" and "The Studio," both of which earned her Emmy nominations.
data.name: Catherine O'Hara

Catherine Anne O'Hara (1954-2026) est une actrice et comédienne canado-américaine. Elle débute sa carrière au Second City Theatre à Toronto. Elle devient célèbre sur la chaîne de télévision SCTV aux côtés d'icônes comiques telles que Rick Moranis et John Candy. Connue du grand public pour ses rôles dans des films tels que After Hours, Beetlejuice, Maman j'ai raté l'avion, et la voix de Sally dans L'Étrange Noël de monsieur Jack, elle est également renommée pour sa participation aux "mocumentaires" de Christopher Guest. Actrice versatile, elle va jusqu'à être la voix de Grand-mère Frump dans le film d'animation La famille Addams en 2019. Elle reçoit diverses récompenses  dont un Golden Globe en 2021 pour son rôle dans la série télévisée Bienvenue à Schitt's Creek.
data.name: Catherine O'Hara

唐禹哲（Danson Tang），1984年9月2日出生于台湾省基隆市，中国台湾流行乐男歌手、影视演员、节目主持人。

2003年，唐禹哲签约八大电视台，并于次年出演个人首部电视剧《撞球小子》  。2007年7月9日，唐禹哲签约艾回唱片并于同年8月17日推出首张音乐专辑《爱我》，而他也凭借该专辑获得了第三届KKBOX数位音乐风云榜年度最佳新人  。2009年，唐禹哲发行个人第二张音乐专辑《D新引力》，并在“2009摩登上海精彩在沃年度大赏”中获得潮流先锋奖 。2010年，出演个人首部电影《铠甲勇士之帝皇侠》。2011年，唐禹哲发行三张个人专辑《开往明天的旅行》，凭借同名单曲获得第八届劲歌王金曲金榜台湾杰出青年歌手奖。2013年，出演爱情剧《还来得及再爱你》。2016年出演都市悬疑电视剧《寻找爱的冒险》，并演唱同名插曲。2017年主演青春励志校园剧《我们的少年时代》 。2018年，网剧《仅剩一口的青春》开播，唐禹哲深情演绎那年青春我们正好
data.name: 唐禹哲

data.biography:
Hunter Haley King, 19 Ekim 1993 tarihinde Ventura County, Kaliforniya'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Eğlence dünyasında tanınan King ailesinin ortanca kızıdır; ablası Kelli King ve özellikle son yıllarda büyük ün kazanan kız kardeşi Joey King de kendisi gibi oyuncudur. Yahudi bir ailede büyüyen Hunter, genç yaşta tiyatro ve jimnastikle ilgilenmeye başladı ve kariyerine "Hannah Montana", "Workaholics" ve "Roswell" gibi dizilerdeki konuk oyuncu rolleriyle adım attı.

Kariyerindeki ilk büyük çıkışını, Nick at Nite kanalının günlük dizisi "Hollywood Heights"ta (2012) canlandırdığı entrikacı Adriana Masters karakteriyle gerçekleştirdi. Ancak Hunter King'in televizyon dünyasında bir yıldız olarak parlamasını sağlayan asıl proje, Amerikan televizyon tarihinin en uzun soluklu ve popüler pembe dizilerinden biri olan "Yalan Rüzgarı" (The Young and the Restless) oldu. 2012 yılında Summer Newman karakterini devralan King, bu rolüyle hem eleştirmenlerin hem de izleyicilerin beğenisini kazandı. Karmaşık ve duygusal derinliği olan bu performansı, ona prestijli Daytime Emmy Ödülleri'nde "Drama Dizisinde En İyi Genç Kadın Oyuncu" dalında iki kez (2014 ve 2015) ödül kazandırdı.

Sadece dram türünde değil, komedide de yetenekli olduğunu kanıtlayan King, 2015 ile 2019 yılları arasında CBS'in sevilen sitcom dizisi "Life in Pieces"ın ana kadrosunda yer aldı. Dizide Clementine Hughes karakterini canlandırarak, Betsy Brandt ve Colin Hanks gibi isimlerle karşılıklı oynadı ve geniş kitlelerce tanınan bir yüz haline geldi.

Son yıllarda kariyer rotasını televizyon filmlerine çeviren Hunter King, özellikle Hallmark Channel yapımlarının aranan başrol oyuncularından biri olmuştur. "Hidden Gems" (2022), "The Professional Bridesmaid" (2023) ve "Nikki & Nora: Sister Sleuths" (2022) gibi romantik ve gizem türündeki filmlerde yer almıştır. Ayrıca 2021 yapımı gerilim filmi "Give Me Your Eyes"da (Gözlerini Kaçırma) kör bir kadını canlandırarak oyunculuk yelpazesinin genişliğini sergilemiştir. Hunter King, hem gündüz kuşağı dramalarındaki başarısı hem de primetime komedilerindeki performansıyla Amerikan televizyonunun istikrarlı ve başarılı isimlerinden biri olarak kariyerine devam etmektedir.

data.overview: Phần tiếp theo được chờ đợi từ lâu của bộ phim năm 1995. Một thanh niên người Anh gốc Á, Mo là một sĩ quan cảnh sát đang nổi lên nhanh chóng, người đã bí mật xâm nhập vào yếu tố côn đồ hồi sinh của Shadwell, những người bị kích động bởi sự tiếp quản của Shadwells bởi một nhà tài phiệt người Nga và cuộc phiêu lưu khó có thể xảy ra của họ vào cuộc cạnh tranh châu Âu. Mo nhanh chóng bị lôi kéo vào sự ly giáo địa phương giữa BNP và EDL và kế hoạch xây dựng một nhà thờ Hồi giáo mới dưới bóng râm của mặt đất Shadwell tạo ra một môi trường bùng nổ trong đó bóng đá và bạo lực chính trị tạo thành một cơn bão hoàn hảo của tình trạng bất ổn xã hội. Giữa lúc này, Mo đang phải đối mặt với câu hỏi tồn tại thiết yếu về việc anh ta thực sự là ai và anh ta thực sự thuộc về đâu. Đã 20 năm trôi qua và Trevor thông minh hiện là siêu thị trưởng, nhưng điều gì sẽ xảy ra với phần còn lại của băng đảng?
data.title: Đội Quân Shadwell

data.biography: Oktay Kaynarca (d. 27 Ocak 1965; Hekimhan, Malatya, Türkiye), Türk oyuncu, yapımcı ve sunucu. Otuz yılı aşkın kariyerinde Altın Portakal Film Festivali ödülü de dâhil birçok ödül kazanmıştır. 1980'li yılların sonunda İstanbul Üniversitesi Devlet Konservatuvarı'na başlamıştır. 1989 yılında ise TRT 1 kanalında yayınlanan Gençler adlı dizide oyunculuk kariyerine başlamıştır. 1990 yılında ise Yavuz Turgul'un yönettiği Aşk Filmlerinin Unutulmaz Yönetmeni adlı filmde oynayarak sinema kariyerine de başlamıştır.1994 yılında Yavuz Özkan'ın yönettiği Yengeç Sepeti adlı filmde canlandırdığı Güner rolüyle olumlu yanıtlar aldı. 1990'lı yıllarda sinema filmleri ve televizyon programları ile kariyerini devam ettirdi. Ayrıca bazı televizyon reklamlarında ve müzik kliplerinde de yer aldı. Deli Yürek adlı dizinin 2002 yılında çıkan Deli Yürek: Bumerang Cehennemi adlı filminde Cemal karakteriyle büyük beğeni toplamıştır. 2000'li yıllarda sinema filmlerinin yanı sıra televizyon dizilerine de ağırlık vermeye başlamıştır. Yeditepe İstanbul (2001-2002) ve Esir Şehrin İnsanları (2003) gibi dizilerde yer almıştır. 15 Ocak 2003 tarihinde Show TV'de başlayan, Osman Sınav'ın yönettiği Kurtlar Vadisi adlı dizide Süleyman Çakır isimli sert, vurdumduymaz, espritüel ve hırçın bir mafya babasını canlandırmıştır. Bu dizide canlandırdığı karakterle büyük yankı uyandırmış ve Türkiye'nin hatta Orta Doğu'nun en çok tanınan oyuncularından birisi hâline gelmiştir. Necati Şaşmaz ile birlikte dizinin başrolünde yer almıştır. Dizinin 45. bölümündeki ölümünden sonra gerçek hayatta cenaze namazı kılınmış, saygı duruşlarında bulunulmuş, salası ve mevlidi okutulmuştur. Dünya çapında ilk defa bir karakter gerçek hayatta bu kadar etki yaratmıştır. Kurtlar Vadisi'nin ardından Kuzey Rüzgârı (2007), Adanalı (2008-2010), Sakarya Fırat (2011) ve Ustura Kemal (2012) gibi dizilerde yer almıştır. Aynı zamanda sinema filmlerinde oynamış ve televizyon programları yapmaya devam etmiştir. 2014 yılında uzun süre ara verdiği tiyatroya geri dönmüştür. 2015 yılında ise Eşkıya Dünyaya Hükümdar Olmaz adlı dizide Hızır Çakırbeyli adlı karakteri canlandırmaya başlamıştır. Süleyman Çakır karakterine yakın bir tarzda olan bu dizideki karakteri ile birçok ödül de almıştır.
data.name: Oktay Kaynarca

data.biography:
Anthony Brandon Wong (born 12 May 1965), often credited simply as Anthony Wong, is an Australian actor. His most notable role is as Ghost in The Matrix Reloaded and The Matrix Revolutions. His role of Ghost was greatly expanded in the video game Enter the Matrix, in which he starred alongside Jada Pinkett Smith as the lead. Prior to landing the role, he originally auditioned for Tank in the first film.

Wong's other roles include the leader of modern-day pirates in Jumping Ship, Little Fish, two stints on Home and Away, Mek – a scientist in Spellbinder: Land of the Dragon Lord, the lead smuggler in the 2004 film Flight of the Phoenix, and as Tasuke Kogo in the 2008 six-part miniseries, Samurai Girl. He played the role of Danny Law in the 2016 comedy TV series The Family Law.

data.biography:
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Scot Williams (born 29 November 1972), is an English actor, writer and producer for stage, film and television.

As an actor, Williams made his film debut in the 1994 Iain Softley film Backbeat, in which he played the role of The Beatle's original drummer Pete Best. Subsequently he later discovered that he was a distant relative of the late Alun Owen, who in 1964 received an academy award nomination for his Beatles screenplay "A Hard Day's Night".

In 1995 Williams played the lead role of Shaun Caine in the Jonathan Harvey play Rupert Street Lonely Hearts Club. The play premiered at London's Donmar Warehouse before later transferring to The Criterion Theatre, Piccadilly.

In 1996 he was given the role of Joe Glover in the powerful television drama Hillsborough. Written by the legendary Jimmy McGovern, Hillsborough was based on the football stadium disaster of 1989 in which 96 Liverpool Football Club supporters unlawfully died and directed by the BAFTA and Emmy winning Charles McDougall. It went on to win dozens of awards around the world, including the 1997 Best Single drama BAFTA award.

In 1999 he played the role of 'Buddy' alongside Lisa Stansfield, Rita Tushingham and Alexei Sayle in the musical "comedy" Swing as well as the part of 'Patrick Callaghan' a one legged heroin addicted informer in the gritty crime "drama" Liverpool One. On playing a one-legged herion addict Scot said "it was a role I was destined to play".

2003/04 saw Williams feature in a trilogy of films written and directed by Peter Greenaway, called The Tulse Luper Suitcases. The first of which "The Moab Story" was an official selection for the Palme d'Or at the Cannes Film Festival. As well as a return to the stage in Chris Honer's award winning production of the Arthur Miller classic "All My Sons" at Manchester's Library Theatre.

In 2005 Scot played the lead role of the American Art authenticator 'Patrick Donovan', alongside Rutger Hauer and Malcolm McDowell in the Venetian set thriller "Tempesta" and also co-starred with Jesse Bradford, Sienna Guillory and Steven Berkoff in the horror film "Perfect Life"

In 2009 he starred in "Clubbed" alongside Colin Salmon and Maxine Peake, playing the iconic bleached blonde lunatic 'Sparky'. In Adrian Vitoria's 'The Crew' an adaptation of Kevin Sampson's novel "Outlaws" Scot played the lead role of 'Ged Brennen', a Liverpool gangster coming to terms with the changing face of crime. 2009 also saw Scot play the lead role of ex-Irish priest 'Sheamy O'Brien' in Maeve Murphy's "Beyond The Fire" alongside Cara Seymour. The film respectfully examined the loving relationship between two victims of sexual abuse and went on to win Best Film at the 2009 London Independent Film Awards. As well as this, Scot also popped up in the British gangster flick "Dead Man Running" alongside Tamer Hassan, Brenda Blethyn and 50 Cent.

Peter Hans Docter (born October 9, 1968) is an American filmmaker and animator who has served as Pixar's chief creative officer (CCO)  since 2018. He has directed the company's animated films Monsters, Inc. (2001), Up (2009), Inside Out (2015), and Soul (2020). From his nine Academy Award nominations, he is a record-three-time recipient of Best Animated Feature for Up, Inside Out and Soul. Docter has also won six Annie Awards from nine nominations, a BAFTA Children's Film Award and a Hochi Film Award. He describes himself as a "geeky kid from Minnesota who likes to draw cartoons".

data.biography: Donald David Dixon Ronald O'Connor (Chicago, Illinois; 28 d'agost de 1925-Calabasas, Califòrnia; 27 de setembre de 2003) va ser un cantant, ballarí i actor nord-americà que va aconseguir la fama en una sèrie de pel·lícules que va coprotagonitzar amb Gloria Jean , Peggy Ryan i la mula Francis. Potser la seva actuació més famosa va ser juntament amb Gene Kelly i Debbie Reynolds a la pel·lícula musical Cantant sota la pluja (1952).
唐纳德·奥康纳（Donald O'Connor，1925 年 8 月 28 日 - 2003 年 9 月 27 日）是一位美国舞蹈家、歌手和演员，他在一系列电影中声名鹊起，在这些电影中，他与格洛丽亚·让、佩吉·瑞恩和会说话的骡子弗朗西斯交替出演。他今天最出名的是他在《雨中曲》中的角色。

Robert Francis "Bobcat" Goldthwait is an American screen and voice actor, comedian, screenwriter, and film and television director.  He became recognized as a solo stand-up comedian and had a record "Meat Bob" and two televised concert specials in the 1980s. During the fall of 1993, he performed stand-up material as an opening act for Nirvana on what would be their final North American tour. Goldthwait is commonly known for his energetic, ravenous stage personality, his dark, acerbic black comedy, and his gruff but high-pitched voice.
data.name: Bobcat Goldthwait

data.biography: Robert Francis "Bobcat" Goldthwait (Syracuse, Nova York, 26 de maig de 1962) és un còmic, actor, director i guionista nord-americà. És conegut pel seu acte de comèdia negra, presentat a través d'un personatge escènic enèrgic amb una veu ronca i aguda inusual.

罗伯特·弗朗西斯·戈德斯韦特 （Robert Francis Goldthwait） 是美国银幕和配音演员、喜剧演员、编剧和影视导演。他被公认为独唱单口喜剧演员，并在 1980 年代发行了一张唱片“Meat Bob”和两场电视演唱会特别节目。1993 年秋天，他表演了单口相声，作为 Nirvana 的开场表演，这将是他们最后一次北美巡演。戈德斯韦特以其精力充沛、贪婪的舞台个性、黑暗、尖刻的黑色喜剧以及他粗鲁但高亢的声音而闻名。

data.overview: Khu rừng miền Tây Virginia giờ đây có cả thảy là 5 kẻ đột biến gen khát máu đang trú ngụ là: Three Finger, Pa, Ma, Brother và Sister (trong phần này không có One Eye và Saw Tooth), bọn chúng vẫn chờ đón những nạn nhân xấu số như phần trước. Một ngày kia một đài truyền hình tổ chức một trò chơi có tính mạo hiểm ngay tại khu rừng Virginia này, mỗi người tham gia trò chơi sẽ được đeo một cái máy camera nhỏ trên đầu rồi đi sâu vào rừng, tất cả những gì họ thấy sẽ được phát lên TV cho hàng triệu khán giả khác thấy, nếu đến tối mà ai tìm được đường ra khỏi khu rừng đầu tiên sẽ là người thắng cuộc, nhận được phần thưởng là số tiền to lớn 100,000 USD. Những người bạn trẻ đó đồng ý ngay vì họ thấy trò này cũng có tính chất cảm giác mạnh, thế là lần lượt từng người bị gia đình của Three Finger giết chết, ai sẽ là người may mắn sống sót trở về.

data.biography:
Kerem Bürsin (born 4 June 1987) is a Turkish actor, known for his work predominantly in films, television and streaming series. After graduating from Emerson College in Marketing Communications Department, Bürsin began his acting career. He gained fame with the role in the TV shows Güneşi Beklerken (2013−2014) and Şeref Meselesi (2014−2015). Bürsin received attention after playing Ali Smith in romance action series Bu Şehir Arkandan Gelecek (2017) for which he won Seoul International Drama Awards for Best Actor respectively.

He is best known for starring in the romantic comedy drama series Sen Çal Kapımı (2020–2021) for which he received critical acclaim and won several accolades including Güzel Awards for Best Couple with Hande Erçel and Turkey Youth Awards for Best Actor.
data.name: Kerem Bürsin

data.biography:
Kerem Bursin, 4 Haziran 1987'de İstanbul'da doğdu. Bursin çocukluğunu hareket halinde geçirdi ve 7 ülkede uluslararası yaşamaya başladı. Yıllarca süren göçmen hayatının ardından ailesi ve Teksas Sugar Land'e yerleşti. Teksas'ta lisede iken oyunculuğa ilgi duydu. Bir oyunda son sınıfını yaptı ve tanındı ve Teksas eyaletinin en iyi oyuncusu da dahil olmak üzere birçok ödül kazandı. Bursin daha sonra Boston'daki Emerson College'a gitti ve burada Halkla İlişkiler üzerine odaklanarak Pazarlama İletişimi dalında uzmanlaştı. Her ne kadar sürekli olarak çok sayıda öğrenci filminde ve oyunda rol alıyorsa, bir aktör olarak kampüste dikkat çekti. Çalışmalarına oyunculuk üzerine odaklanmaya başladı ve Los Angeles'taki Kolej'in son dönemini bitirdi, bu da orada kalmasına yol açtı.

Televizyonda Bursin ilk rolü oldu Roger Corman 'ın Sharktopus : (2010) sonra tekrar 2012 yılında Corman'ın resimlerin başka bir rol aldı Lanetliler Sarayı (2013). Los Angeles'ta birkaç yıl geçirdikten sonra Bursin geçici olarak memleketi İstanbul, Türkiye'ye taşınmaya karar verdi. Hareketinden kısa bir süre sonra tekrar oyunculuk tutkusunu sürdürmeye başladı. Birkaç ay sonra Türkiye'deki kariyeri başlayacak, yönetmen Altan Dönmez ve D-Production'ın TV şovu Günesi Beklerken başrolü(2013) hem Türkiye'de hem de çevre ülkelerde büyük bir fenomen haline gelecektir. Türk izleyici Bursin'le ilk kez 18 yaşındaki lise isyancısı Kerem Sayer'ın tasvirinde tanışacaktı. Kısa bir süre içinde Bursin kalabalığı kazandı, bu rol ona Doğu Avrupa, Türkiye ve Ortadoğu'daki çeşitli ödüller, ticari anlaşmalar ve takdirler kazandırdı.

56 bölüm çekip Günesi Beklerken (2013) için bir seri finali yaptıktan sonra Bursin'e kısa sürede Türkiye'nin ünlü ve önemli yönetmenlerinden Çagan Irmak'ın Unutursam Fisilda adlı filminde yer aldı.Bursin'in rolünü kabul edeceği (2014), 70'li yıllarda İstanbul'da müzik tutkusu olan genç bir bas gitarist olan Erhan. Bursin'in filmdeki küçük ama önemli rolü ona daha fazla tanınırlık ve ödül kazandırdı.

Kariyer tırmanışına devam eden Bursin, halen Türkiye'nin en popüler denim markası MAVI'nin yüzü olarak sunuldu.

Bir sonraki sezonu TV'de Bursin ve yönetmen Altan Dönmez , ünlü İtalyan mafya TV Dizilerinin Türk yapımı olan D-Porductions'taki yapımcılara farklı bir gösteri için yeniden katıldı. Il Ristretto D'Honore. Şeref Meselesi(2014) Bursin'in yirmili yaşların sonlarında Türk intikamının intikamın zirveye ulaşmasına neden olacağı Türk mafyasının hayatına çekilecek kötü çocuk rolünü çekip çekemeyeceğine dair çok fazla eleştirmen vardı. mafya ağacı. Eleştirmenleri şaşırtmak ve tekrar izleyicilerin beğenisini kazanmak için gösteri bir hit oldu.
data.name: Kerem Bürsin

data.biography: Kerem Bürsin es un actor y productor de cine turco. Hollywood-turco pareja producciones turcas en inglés, el idioma ha estado actuando. Bürsin Kanal D, publicado en "Günesi Beklerken" comparte el mismo nombre en la matriz denominada "John Sayer" y su rostro deformado es conocido por sus papeles en "Sayer gemela solar". La película dirigida por Çagan Irmak interpretó a un músico en Whisper, Emmert Tushi. Bürsin, Escocia (Edimburgo), Indonesia (Medan, Yakarta), Emiratos Árabes Unidos (Abu Dhabi, Dubai), Malasia (Kuala Lumpur), Estados Unidos (Texas, Boston, Los Ángeles) vivían en esos países. en 1999, a la edad de doce años, se trasladó a Estados Unidos con su familia. Asumiendo la educación universitaria de actuación se graduó de comunicación de marketing de Emerson College. El concurso de teatro entre escuelas secundarias en toda EE. Sharktopus del productor Roger Corman y apareció en la película Palace of the Damned.

Kerem Bürsin (ur. 4 czerwca 1987) jest tureckim aktorem, znanym głównie z filmów, telewizji i seriali streamingowych. Po ukończeniu Emerson College na wydziale komunikacji marketingowej, Bürsin rozpoczął karierę aktorską. Zdobył sławę dzięki roli w programach telewizyjnych Güneşi Beklerken (2013−2014) i Şeref Meselesi (2014−2015). Bürsin zyskał rozgłos po zagraniu roli Aliego Smitha w serialu akcji romansowej Bu Şehir Arkandan Gelecek (2017), za którą otrzymał Seoul International Drama Awards dla najlepszego aktora.

Jest najbardziej znany z roli w serialu komediodramatycznym romantycznym Sen Çal Kapımı (2020–2021), za który otrzymał uznanie krytyków i kilka wyróżnień, w tym Güzel Awards dla najlepszej pary z Hande Erçel i Turkey Youth Awards dla najlepszego aktora.

کرم بورسین در کشورهای مختلفی از جمله اسکاتلند، اندونزی، امارات متحده عربی، ترکیه، مالزی و ایالات متحده آمریکا زندگی کرده‌است. او در سال ۱۹۹۹ و هنگامی که ۱۲ سال سن داشت؛ با خانواده اش به ایالات متحده نقل مکان کرد. وی از دپارتمان ارتباطات بازاریابی کالج امرسون فارغ‌ التحصیل شد و همزمان با تحصیلش در دانشگاه، دروس بازیگری را گذراند. او به عنوان بهترین بازیگر تئاتر در یک مسابقه در دبیرستانی در ایالات متحده برگزیده شد. او قبل از شروع بازیگری راننده بود. بورسین قبلاً در سال ۲۰۱۰ در فیلم‌های تلویزیونی آمریکایی بازی کرده بود. در ۹ سپتامبر ۲۰۱۳، او در تبلیغاتی برای پیام رسان اجتماعی لاین حاضر شد. بورسین با بازی در نقش «کرم سایر» در سریال در انتظار آفتاب ، شناخته شد. بورسین هر دو سینمای هالیوود و ترکیه را دنبال می‌کند و ترجیح می‌دهد از هر دو زبان انگلیسی و ترکی در هنگام بازی در فیلم‌هایش استفاده کند. او همچنین برنده جایزه بهترین بازیگر بین‌المللی سئول شده‌است. از آخرین سریال هایی که بازی کرده می‌توان به نقش اصلی سریال تو "اگه دوست داشته باشی چی؟" یا "اگه عاشق باشی" به نام «آتش آرچالی» در کنار هافسانور سانجاک توتان اشاره کرد.
data.name: کرم بورسین
